# Omer Etrog — Web Migration Specialist

> Omer Etrog specializes in migrating outdated Wix websites to modern, high-performance tech stacks. Full content migration in under an hour.

## About

Omer Etrog is a web migration specialist based in Israel. He transforms legacy Wix sites into fast, modern websites using React, TypeScript, and Vite. Most migrations are completed in under an hour — including full content transfer, responsive design, and a live URL.

## Services

- **Modern Web Migration**: Outdated Wix sites rebuilt with React + TypeScript + Vite
- **Full Content Transfer**: Every page, image, and blog post migrated automatically
- **Performance Optimization**: Lighthouse scores consistently 95+
- **Bilingual Support**: Hebrew (RTL) and English
- **AI-Powered Development**: Using Claude Code and AI tools to accelerate delivery

## Portfolio Highlights

- **Liat Leshem**: Wix to modern site migration with before/after comparison
- **Bialystok Jewish Heritage**: Nonprofit legacy site migrated with React 18, Express backend, JWT auth, JSON-based CMS. Lighthouse: Performance 99, Accessibility 100, Best Practices 96, SEO 100.
- **AppCard Parking**: Single-page application showcase

## Blog / Insights

### Upgrading a Legacy Flutter iPad App to Flutter 3.41 with Claude Code (March 8, 2026)
Upgraded an iPad loyalty/rewards app from an older Flutter SDK to Flutter 3.41 (Dart 3.11) — 45 modified files across 3 local packages. Null-safety migration, API replacements, data model restructuring, iOS deployment target bump, and network layer debugging. Used parallel agents for bulk modifications and iterated build-test cycles to zero compilation errors.

### Building a JWT Chrome Extension with AI in Minutes (March 1, 2026)
Built a Chrome extension using Claude that automatically detects and decodes JWT tokens from browser cookies and DevTools. Turned a repetitive daily workflow into an instant productivity win.

### Migrating a Nonprofit's Legacy Wix Site with Claude Code (March 3, 2026)
Migrated the Bialystok Jewish Heritage nonprofit site from Wix to React 18 + TypeScript + Vite with Express backend, JWT authentication, JSON-based CMS, and bilingual Hebrew/English support. Achieved Lighthouse scores of 99/100/96/100.

## Technical Details

- Site: https://omer72.github.io/omeretrog-website/
- Stack: React 19, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind CSS v4, Framer Motion
- Hosting: GitHub Pages
- Languages: English, Hebrew (RTL)
